completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith (single cohesive .NET 10 solution), project_type_id=backend; 12 source + 12 test projects; embedded Blazor UI (Picker, AdminPortal). User-confirmed.

Found ~19 existing docs under docs/; no index.md. Existing deployment-guide.md/kubernetes-deployment-architecture.md comprehensive — linked, not overwritten. User emphasis: domain/event-sourcing + API/client contracts.

Tech stack: .NET 10 (SDK 10.0.300), Aspire 13.3.x, DAPR 1.17/1.18, Hexalith.EventStore gateway, FluentValidation 12.1.1, MediatR 14.1.0, FluentUI 5.0-rc, MCP 1.x, xUnit v3. Pattern: event sourcing + CQRS + DAPR actors behind EventStore.

Deep analysis via 6 parallel agents over src/ (contracts, domain execution, client+MCP, security, Blazor, build/deploy/tests). Findings cross-verified; key discrepancies recorded (crypto-shredding enabled-by-default vs README; MCP=5 tools).
Dev/build/test/CI extracted → development-guide.md. Deployment summarized in architecture.md §12 and linked to existing deployment-guide.md (not regenerated).
Single-part architecture.md generated (topology, write/read paths, actors, security, GDPR, decisions). No per-part files (monolith).
Supporting docs: project-overview.md, data-models.md, api-contracts.md, component-inventory.md. No project-parts.json/integration-architecture.md (single-part).
Master index.md generated; links all generated + existing docs; no '(To be generated)' markers (all docs produced).
Validation: 8 docs + state file present; zero incomplete markers; all internal .md links resolve; checklist satisfied for single-part backend.
Finalized. workflow.on_complete resolved empty — no terminal instruction.

findings.project_classification: Monolith / single cohesive .NET 10 solution; backend event-sourced domain service with embedded Blazor UI.
findings.domain: Single Party aggregate (Person|Organization); ~22 commands; ~24 events + rejection events; CQRS read models PartyDetail & PartyIndex; 6 DAPR actors
findings.api: EventStore gateway POST /api/v1/commands & /api/v1/queries (Domain=party); typed .NET client; parties-mcp host with 5 tools
discrepancies: GDPR crypto-shredding implemented & enabled-by-default (Parties:CryptoShredding:IsEnabled=true) despite README 'not in MVP' notice; separate from Parties:Compliance:GdprFeaturesActive warning switch.
parties-mcp exposes 5 tools; get_party_name_at (named in getting-started) does NOT exist; temporal name queries deferred.
Submodules (EventStore/Tenants) not checked out in working copy; referenced by path.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To refresh, re-run /bmad-document-project (it will detect index.md and offer rescan or deep-dive). Existing hand-maintained docs (deployment-guide.md, event-*.md, gdpr-*.md, getting-started.md) were linked, not overwritten.
